title: A carton
abstract: Disclosed is a carton comprising a container (1) and a tearable panel (2), wherein: (a) the container (1) comprises a lid panel (11), a front panel (12), a rear panel (13), a bottom panel (14), and two side panels (15, 16); and (b) the tearable panel (2) comprises an outer edge (21), inner edge (22), a top edge (23), a bottom edge (24), and a window (25) which is at least translucent, said tearable panel (1) is adhered to the container (2) with a de-bondable adhesive, wherein the inner edge (22) of the tearable panel (2) is hingedly attached to the container (1) at a crease line (17) defined between the front panel (12) and one of the two side panels (15) such that the tearable panel (2) can pivot when the tearable panel (2) is de-bonded; and wherein the crease line (17) has a perforated section (18).
claims: Claims Claims 1. A carton comprising a container (1 ) and a tearable panel (2), wherein: a) the container (1 ) comprises a lid panel (1 1 ), a front panel (12), a rear panel (13), a bottom panel (14), and two side panels (15, 16); and b) the tearable panel (2) comprises an outer edge (21 ), inner edge (22), a top edge (23), a bottom edge (24), and a window (25) which is at least translucent, said tearable panel (2) is adhered to the container (1 ) with a de-bondable adhesive, wherein the inner edge (22) of the tearable panel (2) is hingedly attached to the container (1 ) at a crease line (17) defined between the front panel (12) and one of the two side panels (15) such that the tearable panel (2) can pivot when the tearable panel (2) is de-bonded; and wherein the crease line (17) has a perforated section (18). 2. The carton according to claim 1 wherein the distance of the first perforation to the closer end of the crease line (17) is at least 1 mm, preferably from 2 mm to 3 cm. 3. The carton according to claim 1 or 2 wherein the tearable panel 2 is made of two layers (26, 27) of board, preferably paper board. 4. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the window (25) has a light transmittance of at least 70%. 5. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the window (25) is made of plastics, glass, or combination thereof, preferably the window (25) is made of polyester. 6. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the tearable panel (2) is rectangle in shape. 7. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the length of the window (25) is at least 10% of the length of the tearable panel (2), preferably 20 to 60% of the length of the tearable panel (2). 8. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the window (25) is substantially centrally located at the tearable panel (2). 9. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the tearable panel (2) substantially fully overlaps the front panel (12). 10. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the tearable panel (2) is adhesively bonded to the container (1 ) with a de-bondable plastic tape. 1 1. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the container (1 ) has printed indicia on the front panel viewable through the window (25). 12. The carton according to any one of the preceding claims for packaging a skin care product.
